item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
Surge Browser 1.2.0

Introducing your equity ledger — a home for the thing that makes User Cooperative different: your ownership.

  • The all-new equity page. Visit surge://equity for a real-time ledger of your equity in the cooperative. Watch your clicks and dividends update live as you browse, and explore it all through interactive charts that bring your stake to life.
  • Quick access, everywhere. We've added your equity to the menus and toolbar, so your ownership is always one click away.
  • Security updates to keep you protected.
